political.s: FEC: $55K PAC donations; 79% to Republican, 21% to Democratic committees.

charity.focus: Global food security, hunger relief, youth education, farmer support, community development

environment.s: environmental violation: $1.2M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

wiki.extract: Deere & Company, is an American corporation that manufactures agricultural machinery, heavy equipment, forestry machinery, diesel engines, drivetrains used in heavy equipment and lawn care equipment. It also provides financial services and other related activities.

fec.committeeName: DEERE & COMPANY PAC (AKA JOHN DEERE PAC)

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee tripped over the sweeper at the front of a stationary autonomous guided vehicle. The employee fell to the floor and suffered a broken right elbow.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during maintenance, cleaning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: A mechanic (injured employee) was repairing a tractor on an assembly line and was positioned to the rear left side of the tractor. An assembly technician was performing a rockshaft check while positioned to the right front side of the same tractor. When the assembly technician actuated the rockshaft located at the rear of the tractor the mechanic's head was caught between the rockshaft and the Rol

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in or compressed by equipment or objects, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was trying to clear a plug of cotton from the saw cleaner system of a cotton stripper and sustained amputations to the left ring and little fingers.

sampleRecords.event_description: Compressed or pinched by shifting objects or equipment
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On July 7, 2021, an employee was removing a repair trailer from a utility vehicle's hitch using their right hand. As the hitch released, it pinched their right index finger between the tailgate of the utility vehicle and the trailer hitch latch resulting in a laceration and fracture to the right index finger that required surgery and hospitalization.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by falling object or equipment, n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee parked a forklift on a ramp. When the employee got off the forklift to close an overhead door, the forklift started rolling. The employee got on to stop it; it hit a tier rack and the rack fell on the employee, catching his left foot and ankle. The employee developed a muscle injury that required surgery.

topHazards.label: The Attachment Kits are missing the product Operator's Manual which details proper attachment and use of the product, posing an injury hazard.
The voltage regulator in the mower's engine can fail during use or while the product is being stored, causing the engine to overheat, posing fire and burn haza…
The front bell crank in the brake linkage can fail causing the tractor to lose braking, resulting in a crash hazard.
The recalled engines can overheat, posing fire and burn hazards.
Fuel can leak from under the fuel cap, posing a fire hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Kawasaki Motors USA Recalls John Deere ZTrak Zero Turn Mowers with Kawasaki Engines Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves John Deere ZTrak Zero Turn Mowers with model numbers Z720E, Z730M, Z740R and Z760R with Kawasaki engines. Model Start Serial Number End Serial Number Z720E 1TC720E****010001 1TC720E****080657 Z730M 1TC730M****010001 1TC730M****080574 Z740R 1TC740R****010001 1TC740R****080462 Z760R 1TC760R****08000…
hazards: The voltage regulator in the mower's engine can fail during use or while the product is being stored, causing the engine to overheat, posing fire and burn haza…
injuries: Kawasaki has received five reports of fires and 26 reports of melting and/or smoking. No injuries have been reported.
products: John Deere ZTrak™ Zero Turn Mowers with Kawasaki Engines

sampleRecalls.title: John Deere Recalls Compact Utility Tractors Due to Crash Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves 1023E, 1025R and 2025R Compact Utility Tractors with the model number and "John Deere" printed on the hood. The recalled tractors are green and yellow, and were sold with both opened and closed operator stations. The serial numbers of tractors included in this recall can be found at www.deere.com.…
hazards: The front bell crank in the brake linkage can fail causing the tractor to lose braking, resulting in a crash hazard.
injuries: The firm has received four reports of the brake linkage failing, including one hospitalization and two impact injuries and minor property damage to the tractors.
products: John Deere 1023E, 1025R, and 2025R Compact Utility Tractors
units: About 147,900 (In addition, about 16,800 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: Kawasaki Motors USA Recalls Engines Used in Bad Boy Mowers, BigDog, Bobcat, Cub Cadet, Hustler, John Deere and Kubota Brand Lawn and Garden Equipment Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Kawasaki engines used in lawn and garden equipment sold under the Bad Boy Mowers brand name with mower models Rebel BRB54FX850, Rebel BRB6135KA, Rebel BRB61FX850, Rebel BRB7235KA, Revolt BRV54FX850, Revolt BRV61FX850, Rogue BRG5435KA, Rogue BRG6135KA, Rogue BRG61RD35KA, and Rogue BRG72RD35KA; unde…
hazards: The recalled engines can overheat, posing fire and burn hazards.
injuries: Kawasaki has received eight reports of fires with the recalled engines. No injuries have been reported.
products: Kawasaki Engines used in Bad Boy Mowers, BigDog, Bobcat, Cub Cadet, Hustler, John Deere, and Kubota brand lawn and gard…

sampleRecalls.title: John Deere Recalls XUV590 Gator Utility Vehicles Due to Fire Hazard (Recall Alert)
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Gator utility vehicles with model number XUV590E, XUV590M, or XUV590M S4 printed on the hood. "John Deere" and "Gator" are also printed on the cargo box. The recalled utility vehicles have side-by-side seating for two or four people and were sold in green and yellow, olive & black, or TrueTimber® …
hazards: Fuel can leak from under the fuel cap, posing a fire hazard.
products: John Deere™ XUV590E, XUV590M and XUV590M S4 Gator™ utility vehicles
units: About 1,600 (In addition, about 60 were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: John Deere Recalls Lawn Tractors Due to Crash and Injury Hazards (Recall Alert)
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves John Deere lawn tractors, models X380 and X390. The tractors are green and yellow. John Deere and the model are printed on the side. The serial number is located on the frame on the front right side of the machine near the engine. Recalled serial number ranges are as follows: Model Serial Number R…
hazards: The wheel hubs were not manufactured to specifications and can fail, causing the tractor to lose braking and propulsion, posing crash and injury hazards.
injuries: The firm has received three reports of the lawn tractor not braking properly. One minor injury resulting in bruises and abrasions has been reported.
products: John Deere X380 and X390 Lawn Tractors
units: About 160 (In addition, about 30 were sold in Canada)
